2605.00373.title: Language-free Experience at Expo 2025 Osaka
2605.00373.paper_summary: In line with the Global Communication Plan 2025, we have pursued the development of multilingual translation technologies to realize a language-barrier-free experience at Expo 2025 Osaka. Our work includes the advancement of simultaneous interpretation systems emphasizing high translation quality and low latency. Key achievements include chunk-based input segmentation, context-aware translation, and multi-engine machine translation technologies. Through demonstration deployments and collaboration with private companies, our technologies have led to real-world applications, with several services and systems showcased at Expo 2025 Osaka.
2605.00373.paper_summary_zh: 根據全球溝通計畫2025，我們致力於開發多語言翻譯技術，以實現2025年大阪博覽會的無語言障礙體驗。<lb/>我們的工作包括推進強調高翻譯質量和低延遲的同聲傳譯系統。<lb/>主要成就包括基於區塊的輸入分段、上下文感知翻譯和多引擎機器翻譯技術。<lb/>通過示範部署和與私營公司的合作，我們的技術已導致現實世界的應用，並在2025年大阪博覽會上展示了幾項服務和系統。
2605.00373.author: Michael Paul et.al.
2605.00373.authors: Michael Paul, Kenji Imamura, Xiaolin Wang, Shohei Higashiyama, Masao Utiyama
